semantic.role: Vitest integration test suite for the publish-preflight service, validating runtime assertions and lock serialization in isolated project environments.
responsibilities: Creates isolated temporary directories to simulate ArchSpine project root structures.
Invokes the built CLI executable to test publish runtime baseline assertions end-to-end.
Validates that assertPublishRuntimeBaseline throws appropriate ArchSpineError instances for missing or malformed spine configurations.
Tests assertPublishSnapshotReady with mocked manifest and lock files to ensure snapshot readiness checks.
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual utility functions (e.g., serializeLockPayload) in isolation.
Testing non-publish related services or CLI commands.
Production runtime logic; this is a test suite.
invariants: Relies on Vitest test framework for structure and assertions.
Assumes the existence of a built CLI at dist/cli/index.js.
Operates in isolated temporary directories to avoid side effects.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Ensure publish-preflight service behaves correctly under various project configurations and error conditions before deployment.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Unclear from code evidence; the vague commit message 'iZoy's great commit' does not indicate specific test modifications.
